name: @decentralized-global-education-skills-passport/keeper
description: Permissionless reveal keeper: waits for Drand round R, opens the reveal window with R's real signature, then decrypts and reveals every sealed bid. Idempotent; no relayer, no agent, no mock.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/dry-run.test.ts src/keeper.test.ts src/watch.test.ts src/store.test.ts src/watch-queue.test.ts src/settlement-guard.test.ts src/status.test.ts src/status-server.test.ts src/queue-replay.test.ts
